description.value: Aura faint abjuration and transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot armor; Price 2,430 gp; Weight 30 lbs. DESCRIPTION This reflective +1 breastplate is decorated with a sword-and-starburst symbol. The armor is normally a golden color, but in battle it becomes silver-gray. The wearer can use bless weapon and remove fear each once per day CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells bless weapon, remove fear; Price 1,390 gp
